notes: Fix debug export token semantics: /debug/export?token=... now expects GIFT_ADMIN_TOKEN only; GitHub PAT is read only from env GITHUB_DEBUG_TOKEN.
Add /debug/store-live?token=<GIFT_ADMIN_TOKEN> as no-cache live debug fallback even when GitHub export fails.
Add /debug/github-check?token=<GIFT_ADMIN_TOKEN> with safe masked env diagnostics for repo, branch and debug paths.
Make /debug/export return live debug in the response body even if GitHub returns 403/404/other write errors.
FixMedia: same-origin attachment download route now sends stable Content-Type, Content-Disposition and Accept-Ranges headers.
FixMedia: public video/image comment upload route now supports Range/206 for iOS/MAX WebView playback.
FixMedia: client hotfix removes shared AbortController signal from comment/media mutation fetches to prevent Fetch is aborted during file saves.
FixMedia: iOS visualViewport keyboard guard for the bottom composer/input area.
